caption: A man with a beard wears a black t-shirt, a gold chain, and a dark blue baseball cap with a logo, while wearing large grey headphones around his neck. He is seated in a studio setting in front of a professional microphone on a boom arm. In the background, a white wall displays a repeating logo and stars, and a screen shows the text "BOSS TALK 101". An on-screen graphic in the lower left corner reads "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST". Across the sequence, the man is speaking, shifting his gaze and gesturing with his right hand. In the early part of the clip, his hand is resting, but he soon lifts it to gesture toward his chest while talking. His expression remains engaged as he looks slightly to his left toward an unseen person, with his mouth open in mid-speech throughout the frames.
